CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:CrashAnalyzer.kt$CrashAnalyzer$fun analyze( report: ProcessFailureReport, manifest: ProcessManifest?, ): DiagnosticResult

LongMethod:OrchestratorServiceImpl.kt$OrchestratorServiceImpl$private fun buildRepairAction( repairId: String, strategy: RepairStrategy, outcome: RepairOutcome, report: ProcessFailureReport, ): RepairAction

LongMethod:RepairEngine.kt$RepairEngine$private suspend fun executeStrategy( processId: String, strategy: RepairStrategy, report: ProcessFailureReport, manifest: ProcessManifest?, diagnostic: DiagnosticResult, ): RepairOutcome

MaxLineLength:HttpAiRepairClient.kt$HttpAiRepairClient$"""{"explanation":"<why this fix works>","patches":[{"filePath":"<path>","description":"<what changed>","originalSnippet":"<exact lines to replace>","patchedSnippet":"<replacement lines>"}]}"""
MaxLineLength:HttpAiRepairClient.kt$HttpAiRepairClient$"You are a precise code repair assistant. Always respond with valid JSON only. Do not include markdown code fences."
MaxLineLength:HttpAiRepairClient.kt$HttpAiRepairClient$appendLine("You are an AI code repair assistant. Analyze the process failure below and propose a minimal surgical fix.")
MaxLineLength:HttpAiRepairClient.kt$HttpAiRepairClient$appendLine("You are an AI configuration repair assistant. Suggest configuration changes for the failing process.")
